name: Tenable Cloud
description: Vulnerability management and scanning platform. Monitor scan results and security posture.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Tenable.io
2. Go to Settings → My Account → API Keys
3. Click Generate to create a new key pair
4. Copy the Access Key and Secret Key
5. Paste both values below

credentialFields.label: Access Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Tenable.io → Settings → My Account → API Keys.

credentialFields.label: Secret Key
credentialFields.helpText: Shown once when generating API keys.
